title: Business Modules — CRM, Finance, Inventory, HR, Support, Logistics

tasks.title: CRM: contacts, leads, deals, pipeline, follow-up automation
Support: tickets, SLA, macros, customer health, escalation
Finance: invoices, expenses, budgets, cashflow, CFO report
Inventory: SKU, stock levels, reorder alerts, supplier management
HR: employees, recruitment pipeline, onboarding, policies
Logistics: shipments, vehicles, routes, vendor management
Sales: quotes, proposals, deal desk, approval workflows
Marketing: campaigns, content calendar, social, analytics
API Connector Hub: auth, health checks, webhook logs
Connector integrations: Telegram, GitHub, Paperclip, Hermes Gateway, Zoho
